## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's service expansion strategy and deep dive into link building operations.](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Jason is ramping up quickly with 3-6 clients, exploring new service lines](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Link building is the most mature service outside core offerings, priced at $6k for 15-20 backlinks/month](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Potential new services: case studies, design/graphical content, outbound (on hold)](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Current pricing structure anchored in SEO; Jason working on flexible packaging for multiple work streams](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)

## Topics

### Client Management and Workload

  - [Jason managing 3-4 clients, potentially up to 6 including DataGrid](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [Challenges with DataGrid: need strategy before content creation](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [General client satisfaction, but Jason notices operational "cracks"](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

### Service Expansion Strategy

  - [Marcel's vision: build service, tell story, integrate into offerings](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Jason's focus: develop process for adding, quality-assuring, and selling new services](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Potential new services:](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [Case studies (Mara has expertise from Verbitum)](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
      - [Design/graphical content (high demand, current cost \~$30-50/image)](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [Outbound (previously attempted, mixed results)](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Clients frequently request design services, currently outsourced](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

### Link Building Operations

  - [Jimmy manages link building for 8 clients](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Process:](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
    1.  Month 1: Exchange links with existing clients
    2.  Months 2-3: Use link brokers ($100-150/link based on domain authority)
    3.  Months 3+: Create "link magnet" content to organically attract backlinks
  - Example: Steadily spent $70k on links over 8-10 months to rank \#1 for key term
  - [Firework case study: Created stats pages, attracting 40-60 backlinks/month organically](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=654.0)

### Pricing and Packaging

  - [Current structure: 3 tiers (2 SEO-focused, 1 custom workflow)](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Jason developing flexible packaging for 10-50 work streams](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Link building priced at $6k/month for 15-20 backlinks (market rate \~$500/link, GrowthX charges \~$300/link)](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Challenge: Can't pitch specific outcomes beyond backlink quantity](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Explore development of case studies service with Mara's expertise](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Investigate pricing and delivery model for design/graphical content service](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Continue refining flexible pricing and packaging structure for multiple work streams](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Consider increasing link building pricing to align closer with market rates](https://fathom.video/share/v-Mecs8u5WgcuwAvgY3Fy_EtYDF_3V7x?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
